description_long: This electric drill features a cylindrical blue metal body with visible wear, scratches, and welded seams, giving it an industrial, well-used appearance. The drill has two extended arms ending in metallic clamp-like grippers, suggesting it may be a specialized tool or robotic variant. A prominent 'CAUTION' label is affixed to one side, enhancing its utilitarian look and indicating safety awareness. The front section houses a protruding drill bit assembly, while the rear displays a hexagonal panel, possibly for maintenance or access. The legs are short and robust, ending in black and silver feet, designed for stability. The overall design is rugged, with visible bolts and mechanical joints, suitable for demanding urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, blue, cylindrical electric drill with clamp-like arms, a caution label, and a protruding drill bit, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drill bit assembly and one clamp arm partially visible, with the cylindrical body facing forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting both extended clamp arms, the 'CAUTION' label, and the full cylindrical body with visible wear.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the drill, the hexagonal panel, and the opposite clamp arm, with the drill bit assembly less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying both clamp arms extended, the hexagonal rear panel, and the worn blue surface.
